name: report_debug_core
full_help:
report_debug_core

Description: 
Report details on debug cores

Syntax: 
report_debug_core  [-file <arg>] [-append] [-return_string] [-full_path]
                   [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name              Description
  -----------------------------
  [-file]           Filename to output results to. (send output to console if
                    -file is not used)
  [-append]         Append the results to file, don't overwrite the results 
                    file
  [-return_string]  Return report as a string
  [-full_path]      Display full hierarchical net path in report
  [-quiet]          Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]        Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report, Debug
